array.string: mkdir -p ~/Pictures/ScreenShots && find "$HOME/Desktop" -maxdepth 1 \( -name "Screenshot*.png" -o -name "Screen Shot*.png" -o -name "Screenshot*.jpg" \) -mtime +30 -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do filename=$(basename "$file"); if mv "$file" ~/Pictures/ScreenShots/; then echo "Moved: $filename"; else echo "Failed to move: $filename"; fi; done && remaining=$(find "$HOME/Desktop" -maxdepth 1 \( -name "Screenshot*.png" -o -name "Screen Shot*.png" -o -name "Screenshot*.jpg" \) | wc -l) && echo "Script completed. $remaining screenshot(s) remain on desktop."
